compiled_state.title: Tickets branch has merge conflict on fresh Claude Code web session start
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description: Starting a new session in Claude Code web and attempting to use the ticket system (e.g., ticket create) fails with 'error: Committing is not possible because you have unmerged files' due to an unresolved rebase conflict on the tickets orphan branch. The .tickets-tracker worktree had an interactive rebase in progress with a both-added conflict on .gitignore. Users should not need to manually resolve ticket branch conflicts just to use the ticket system in a fresh session. The ticket system init or session startup should detect and resolve (or abort) stale rebase state on the tickets branch.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). severity=1, complexity=1, environment=1, intermittent=0.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned (high confidence). System has _abort_stale_rebase in merge-to-main.sh but this logic was never extended to the tickets branch in ticket-init.sh or ticket-lib.sh.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: SAFEGUARD APPROVED: user approved editing ticket scripts. Shared fix with c806-d740.
comments.author: Test
